serviceArea: Based in Bridgewater, serving the South Shore and Nova Scotia, with larger events and selected bookings available across the Maritimes / Atlantic Canada. Travel quoted separately.
announcement: Based in Bridgewater - Serving South Shore & Nova Scotia - Larger Maritime bookings by quote
deliveryNote: First 15 km free from Bridgewater, then $0.72/km.
availabilityNote: Submitting a request does not confirm your booking. Nova Kingdom Rentals will confirm availability, travel cost, setup suitability, staffing requirements, and deposit details before your reservation is finalized.
socialText: Follow Nova Kingdom Rentals for new arrivals, event inspiration, and special offers.
